_meta.description: Conservative synonym lookup for redundant modifier compression. Only apply when the synonym is visually equivalent — no creative paraphrasing. Each entry maps a verbose modifier pair to a single concise term that preserves the same visual concept. v1.1.0: Audited per ChatGPT 93/100 review — removed 5 redundantModifiers (mood/material/era shift: grizzled, deep→deep, soft→gentle, hard→rigid, wet→sodden) and 5 compoundFormations (inventive: chiaroscuro, storm-driven, ice-covered, fog-shrouded, moss-covered stone).
rules: Only apply within a single phrase segment (never cross phrase boundaries)
Both original modifiers must be semantically redundant (saying the same thing twice)
The replacement must produce the same visual output in image generation
If in doubt, do not compress — preservation outranks enrichment (Law 2)
